chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5142 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.22448/2018 (Stay). 2. For hearing of Main Case. 01.09.2021 Mr. Muhammad Adnan Moton, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Nadeem Taqi, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Iqbal Khuram, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that since the dispute between them has been resolved in view of a decision of the Customs Appellate Tribunal vide judgment dated 23.10.2018, hence, he does not press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
